rulings.Case Title: PHUONG T. NGUYEN VS. LONDON BREED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Ryan James Pattersons Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 10, 2023 line 1. DEFENDANT RYAN PATTERSON Defendant Ryan James Pattersons Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike is continued to April 14, 2023 to be heard with other pending motions.=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MARK BECHELLI ET AL VS. JOHN C. KILROY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Withheld On The Basis Of A Claimed Privilege And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 10, 2023 line 2. PLAINTIFF MARK BECHELLI, BECHELLI & ROSSI, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, JANET BECHELLI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Withheld On The Basis Of A Claimed Privilege And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Hearing Required. All parties to be present in-person. Prior to the hearing, the parties shall meet and confer and consider an appointment of a discovery referee. If parties do not agree on a referee and further review of the documents subject to this motion will be required after the hearing, the Court will consider setting a hearing within the next ten days to address why a discovery referee should not be appointed.=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: PASCUAL AJANEL RAMOS RAMOS ET AL VS. CARMEN A. SOLIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 10, 2023 line 3. DEFENDANT LEO BAUTISTA Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is DENIED. Allegations in the First Amended Complaint are sufficient to state causes of action against the landlord/co-owner of the property, the Trust. Whether these allegations may be proven or disputed at a later stage of the litigation is not an issue to be addressed on a motion for judgment on the pleadings.=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 10, 2023 line 4. DEFENDANT VICTORIA AQUINO Motion To Compel Deposition Appearance is GRANTED. rulings.Case Title: JEAN FANG AS TRUSTEE OF THE JOSHUA D. LAM 2014 VS. FRANCE BENDER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 10, 2023 line 6. DEFENDANT FRANCE BENDER FINANCIAL DISTRESS DECLARATION is DENIED. Per the verified Complaint the operative 3 Day Notice was served on March 3, 2023 demanding rent for the months of December 2022 to February 2023. Remedies under CCP 1179.03(h) are not applicable to this time period.=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
